title: sql.bulkInsert params
description: Parameters for native ODBC bulk insert through the Plug RPC profile

table.description: Target table identifier. Runtime accepts simple identifier paths such as table or schema.table.

max_len.description: Maximum length for variable-size types when needed by the driver.

rows.description: Array rows. Each row must have the same length and order as columns.

client_token.description: Opaque token (hex) or JWT for authorization. Required when enableClientTokenAuthorization is active. Aliases: clientToken, auth

idempotency_key.description: Unique key for request deduplication (TTL 5min). Reusing the same key with a different request payload is rejected.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum ODBC bulk insert time in milliseconds. Effective timeout is the minimum between this value and any active internal stage budget.

database.description: Optional target database override for this bulk insert request. When the resolved client token payload contains payload.database, this field becomes required and must match it exactly after trim + case-insensitive normalization.
